import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import Header from '../components/Header'; import Footer from '../components/Footer'; import { ShoppingCart, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react'; const CartPage = () => { const [cartItems, setCartItems] = useState([ { id: 1, name: "Camiseta Oversized", price: 129.90, quantity: 1, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/100" }, { id: 2, name: "Calça Cargo", price: 259.90, quantity: 2, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/100" }, ]); const [couponCode, setCouponCode] = useState(''); const [cep, setCep] = useState(''); const handleRemoveItem = (itemId) => { setCartItems(cartItems.filter(item => item.id !== itemId)); }; const handleQuantityChange = (itemId, newQuantity) => { setCartItems(cartItems.map(item => item.id === itemId ? { ...item, quantity: newQuantity } : item )); }; const calculateTotal = () => { return cartItems.reduce((total, item) => total + item.price * item.quantity, 0); }; return (
